quote_of_day.text: China. Shows body discovery of 25 year old young woman who died as the result of erotic asphyxiation. Worked as a medical nurse and online model. Lubricated vibrator was found lying at her feet. Her va-ginal and an-al passages had the same lubricant in them.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A toxic high pressure system of caste hatred dominated the board, bringing with it a torrent of violent and dehumanizing rhetoric against low castes.

This noxious front showed no signs of abating throughout the day. A scattered drizzle of erotic asphyxiation cases and incel anxieties persisted, with Anon sharing graphic scenarios and seeking transformation advice.

The atmosphere remained heavy with dark and disturbing content. Meanwhile, a cold snap of hostility towards Buddhists blew in, sparked by Anon's inflammatory comments.

The usual squalls of debate and insults followed, with Hindu nationalism and veganism entering the fray.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Others Respond
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post calling for violence against low castes, including killing, beheading, and other forms of brutal harm.

The post listed specific violent actions, including dropping low castes in a vat of acid, using them as manure, and setting them on fire.

Another anon responded by claiming that low castes are responsible for India's poverty and that they have ruined prestigious Indian institutions. This anon also described low castes as "dirty, smelly" and implied that they are to blame for India's poor reputation.

A third anon suggested that allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames would not solve the problem, citing cases where low castes have committed crimes and then blamed upper castes.

This anon argued that low castes are inherently flawed and that their actions are a result of their nature.

One respondent brought up a specific case of a dalit man who was accused of raping a 5-year-old and claimed that the dalit community abandoned him.

This anon also joked about the idea of "dalit death" and expressed a desire to see the end of low castes.

The conversation also touched on the topic of reservations, with one anon arguing that low castes are dysgenic and that those who use reservations are "total dysgenic death." Another anon expressed a desire to destroy "rejerbhation fags" and engage in violent and degrading acts against them.

Throughout the thread, various anons expressed hatred and contempt for low castes, with some suggesting that they should be killed or harmed in some way. Others discussed the idea of caste and its implications, with some arguing that low castes are inherently inferior.

The thread also included some tangents, including a discussion about the relative contributions of different castes and communities to Indian society. However, the dominant theme was one of hatred and violence towards low castes.

articles.title: Erotic asphyxiation cases shared on imageboard
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread sharing a case of a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who died during a livestream in Italy amid the COVID-19 pandemic.

The model was using a high-quality pirated VPN, which delayed the discovery of his location and corpse by at least 24 hours.

Another anon responded with a case from a 2004 German Forensic Medicine textbook, where a 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner during a strangulation fetish session.

The perpetrator was acting as a safe spotter but encouraged the partner to push the session further. Anon also shared a case of a 23-year-old woman who died while engaging in erotic asphyxiation with her male partner.

He had waited too long before intervening, leaving her hanging for a minute while he masturbated.

Other cases included an 18-year-old man who streamed his own death on an erotic platform after a viewer's request, and a 27-year-old man who died while streaming on LiveJasmin, wearing a condom.

Anons discussed how people develop an affinity for autoerotic asphyxiation, with some suggesting it can be induced by past traumas or behavior.

Others noted that the brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect, leading to powerful orgasms and addiction.

One respondent wondered how people acquire a taste for such fetishes, while another shared a personal experience of being saved by a broken noose. A user also expressed discomfort with hanging videos, finding them painful to watch.

The thread also included graphic and disturbing content, with one user commenting that the discussion was "painful af" and another suggesting that those uncomfortable with the topic simply watch other threads.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body:
Anon kicked off the discussion with a question on whether it's possible to transform from an incel to a Chad in just two months.

One respondent suggested that getting in shape is achievable within that timeframe, but changing one's personality is harder, especially for those who are autistic.

Another anon advised the original poster to stop using labels like "randi" and instead think of promiscuous women as simply that, as it could enhance their chances of meeting one.

A different approach was suggested by an anon who recommended a high-carb diet combined with exercise, specifically 200 grams of simple carbs daily, to achieve physical transformation.

Some anons engaged in a conversation about the use of certain language and terminology, with one suggesting that using Hindi abuses and women-centric galis can be off-putting, especially in front of women.

One blunt response to the OP's question was to simply "get fucked, incel" and provided a list of actions to take, including going to the gym, eating protein, sleeping, growing a beard, getting a haircut, and stopping habits like fap and bitching.

The discussion also touched on unrelated topics, including types of underwear and sharing content on the platform.

articles.title: Anon mentions 'Gobarida edition'
articles.body: Anon started the thread with 'Gobarida edition'. Replies sought clarification on the term. Anon suggested possibilities: a product or publication related to biogas technology, a book or publication, or a cultural reference. Another Anon expressed desire for a 'robo waifu' and criticized 3D female characters.

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Dumb', Sparks Debate
articles.body:
Anon questioned the intelligence of Buddhists, calling them "straight up atheist" and claiming their religion promotes "cuckery". They praised Hindus, saying they are more open-minded and question everything.

Another anon responded, saying Buddhism emerged from Hinduism and was initially an elite pursuit, with Buddha's earliest followers being Brahmins and Kshatriyas.

A different anon noted that Ambedkarite Buddhism, popular among some low-caste Indians, is not recognized by actual Buddhist scholars.

The discussion quickly turned hostile, with multiple anons using derogatory language towards Buddhists and low-caste individuals. Some claimed Buddhism was "ruined" by low-caste conversions, while others made aggressive comments about Pakistan and Muslims.
